user.title: Meshtastic UI
user.description: Connect directly to your Meshtastic radio. Choose a connection type.

tcp.title: TCP Connection
tcp.description: Enter the IP address or hostname of your Meshtastic radio.

serial.title: Serial Connection
serial.description: Enter the serial device path for your Meshtastic radio.

ble.title: Bluetooth Connection
ble.description: Select a discovered Meshtastic radio or enter a BLE address manually.

ble_manual.title: Bluetooth Connection
ble_manual.description: No Meshtastic radios were discovered. Enter the BLE address manually.

bluetooth_confirm.title: Set up Meshtastic radio
bluetooth_confirm.description:
A Meshtastic radio was discovered via Bluetooth:

**{name}**
`{address}`

If your radio's Bluetooth pairing mode is **Fixed PIN**, enter the 6-digit PIN below. For **Random PIN** mode, leave the field blank — your operating system will prompt for the PIN during pairing. For **No PIN** mode, leave it blank.

data_description.ble_pin: 6-digit PIN configured on the radio (Bluetooth → Fixed PIN). Leave blank for OS-level pairing.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the radio. Check the address and ensure the radio is powered on.
error.ble_unreachable: Home Assistant's Bluetooth stack can't reach that device. Ensure a Bluetooth adapter or proxy is in range.
error.not_meshtastic: Connected, but that device doesn't expose the Meshtastic BLE service. Double-check the address.
